name: Threshold Before Action
description: A moment where the person has enough information but still seeks more certainty.

name: Small Public Commitment
description: A low-risk public experiment tests whether the person can act before feeling fully ready.

name: Identity Cost Moment
description: A choice requires losing an old identity before the new identity is socially confirmed.

name: Relationship Truth Moment
description: A relationship reveals whether the person can express discomfort before disappearing.

name: Energy Bill Comes Due
description: The body and attention system stop subsidizing an over-controlled life structure.

name: Family Permission Break
description: The person realizes that waiting for family permission may be the mechanism keeping the old life stable.
